understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked with `+` in the semantic grid, with the requirement that all goals in a level must be occupied simultaneously to register a WIN and ultimately complete all levels in the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used cardinal actions that attempt to shift the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) per action; moves can be blocked by walls/obstacles or behave unexpectedly depending on boundary/object rules. If a pushable object is adjacent in the move direction, the selected piece can push it along. When multiple selectables exist, `CLICK` switches control to the selectable located at the provided pixel-coordinate position (matching the coordinates listed in the state), after which movement actions apply to that newly selected piece.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Test whether moving into a blocking wall triggers any special behavior (slide/teleport) since the piece is fully enclosed.
history.reasoning: Test whether moving into a blocking wall triggers any special behavior (slide/teleport) since the piece is fully enclosed.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | Test whether the right-side "wall" hint is a false positive from the large boundary wall by attempting to move right anyway.
history.reasoning: Test whether the right-side "wall" hint is a false positive from the large boundary wall by attempting to move right anyway.

history.summary: Turn 3: MOVE_RIGHT | Try pushing the adjacent selectable to the right; collisions may allow a squeeze/shift even though a wall is hinted.
history.reasoning: Try pushing the adjacent selectable to the right; collisions may allow a squeeze/shift even though a wall is hinted.

history.summary: Turn 4: CLICK | The current selectable is boxed in by walls; switch control to the other selectable at [33,21] which is closer to the goal area.
history.reasoning: The current selectable is boxed in by walls; switch control to the other selectable at [33,21] which is closer to the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_UP | Try moving up into the adjacent goal area; the hint says goal+wall so we need to test if the goal space is actually enterable.
history.reasoning: Try moving up into the adjacent goal area; the hint says goal+wall so we need to test if the goal space is actually enterable.

history.summary: Turn 6: MOVE_RIGHT | Try stepping right into the adjacent goal area; the blocked hint may still allow entry onto the goal region.
history.reasoning: Try stepping right into the adjacent goal area; the blocked hint may still allow entry onto the goal region.
